calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2026 Continued To Jul-29-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jun-10-2026 Continued To Jul-24-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau appearing represented by Tiffanie Brown, Esq., via Zoom.
Defendant UBR Construction & Roofing Inc. not appearing.

This matter is continued as there is a 170.6 challenge to Judge Tong on file and there is not a bench officer available this day to hear it.

This matter is continued to July 24, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2026 Continued To Jun-17-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
